# Vendored presentation assets

- `new.css/new.min.css`: @exampledev/new.css 1.1.2, MIT license.
- `fonts/Inter-*.woff2`: Inter font family, SIL Open Font License 1.1.
- `inter.css`: local font-face declarations for the selected Inter weights.

The source bytes are pinned by `test/visual/assets/asset-manifest.json`. Production uses these local copies to avoid runtime CDN and font-host dependencies.
